# FlorenceEGI — Creator Site Configurator
# https://creator-staging.florenceegi.com

> This is the creator site configurator for FlorenceEGI ecosystem.
> Registered creators preview and commission their professional website.

## About
Creator Staging is a configurator where FlorenceEGI creators
preview their artist website with real content from EGI API,
choose template, animation, 3D scene, and subdomain, then
commission FlorenceEGI SRL (web agency) to build it.

## Pages
- /[locale]/ — Home page with live preview
- /[locale]/works — Gallery of artworks
- /[locale]/about — Artist biography and timeline
- /[locale]/exhibitions — Exhibitions
- /[locale]/collections — Artist collections
- /[locale]/contact — Contact form

## Languages
Available in: Italian (it), English (en), French (fr),
German (de), Spanish (es), Chinese (zh).

## Templates
6 structural templates: Oscura, Canvas, Immersive,
Scrollytelling, Magazine, Brutalist.

## Technical
Built with Next.js 15. Three.js 3D scenes. GSAP animations.
Content from FlorenceEGI API. Part of FlorenceEGI ecosystem.
